meta.description: Australian federal candidate transparency dataset. Every populated position requires sources. See ../CONTRIBUTING.md and schema.json.

candidates.name: EXAMPLE — Template Entry (not a real person)

immigration.summary: Describe the candidate's stated immigration position or recorded votes here. Keep it factual and neutral. Replace this text.

faith.summary: Record only publicly stated faith or on-record statements about religion. Replace this text.

economic_nationalism.summary: Record positions/votes on local infrastructure, manufacturing, local employment, procurement, foreign ownership. Replace this text.

foreign_policy.summary: Record foreign-policy positions and votes, including foreign aid and Middle East policy. Replace this text.

citizenship_eligibility.summary: Record Section 44 constitutional eligibility status only (e.g. 'Confirmed sole Australian citizen; renounced prior citizenship on DATE'). Replace this text.

donors.summary: Summarise disclosed donations from AEC records. Replace this text.
